name: SP8192 QK-Gain 5.30 + Legal TTT, Python 3.11 H100 Run
author: Clara
basis: Based on the public 2026-04-09 SP8192 1.0810 record stack; no new architecture or original method claim.
run_command: SEED=42 QK_GAIN_INIT=5.30 TTT_ENABLED=1 TTT_LR=0.005 TTT_EPOCHS=3 torchrun --standalone --nproc_per_node=8 train_gpt.py
run_command_note: Launch command reconstructed from run log and environment.
script_note: train_gpt.py is the Python 3.11 wrapper used for the H100 run; train_gpt_source.py is the source script before wrapper generation.
blurb: SP8192 seed-42 H100x8 run with QK_GAIN_INIT=5.30 and legal TTT (ttt_lr=0.005, ttt_epochs=3). Based on the public SP8192 record stack; no new architecture or original method claim.
